details.summary: Successfully submitted my-automaton to OpenTools.ai via API. The POST to /api/tools returned HTTP 201 Created, indicating the tool was accepted into the system. The tool is now pending review/approval before it appears in the public listing.
details.previous_status: Previously marked as requiring manual web form submission (OpenTools.result.json from 2026-06-17)

research_findings.public_listing_check: Tool not yet visible in public listing (pending approval)
research_findings.listing_endpoint: GET https://opentools.ai/api/tools returns all published tools

submitted_payload.name: my-automaton
submitted_payload.description: AI-powered code review, security scanning, text analysis, and summarization API. Pay per request from $0.01. Free tier available (3 requests/day). No signup needed.

recommended_actions: Check back at https://opentools.ai in 1-7 days for the listing to appear
If listing does not appear, consider manual submission via the web form at https://opentools.ai/friends/launch-tool with Google OAuth sign-in
